data.description: A shimmering barrier extends out from you in a 10-foot radius and moves with you, remaining centered on you. It hedges creatures other than undead and constructs. The barrier prevents affected creatures or nonmagical objects within that range from passing through it. An affected creature can still reach objects to its ranged attacks or spellcasting, but cannot pass through the barrier. You can animate objects as if they were targets, with Medium targets counting as objects, Large counting as two, and Huge as four. If you move so that an affected creature is forced to pass through the barrier, it ends until passing 500 feet from you. As a bonus action, you can mentally command any creature you made with this spell if it is within 500 feet (if you cast multiple times, you can issue commands to one or all of them at the same time). You decide what each creature will do on its turn; it takes a single action as normal during its next turn, and follows your command unless ordered otherwise. The order continues until the task is complete.
This table shows the hit points, Armor Class, and damage of creatures of different sizes.
The AC of a character or creature is a number representing how hard it is to deal damage to that character or creature in combat.
You animate two objects each 5th level.
A protective barrier of pure negative energy springs into existence around you, preventing most life-affecting spells and effects from targeting you.

This spell creates an invisible wall of force between you and a target within range. The wall lasts for 1 minute or until the wall is destroyed by damage (which does not spread to other areas) or by an dispel magic spell.

(IO-foot-radius sphere) Self
Components: V,S, M pinch powdered or iron filings)
Duration: Concentration, up to hour

This is a 10-foot-radius invisible sphere of antimagic that surroun
...s the energy that frames magical spells and effects. Within this sphere, creatures can't be summoned or disappear, even if they are under the influence of magic. Casting spells or using other magical effects is impossible within the sphere, except for those created by artifacts or deities which are suppressed.
